outreach.message: Hi Tracy! Great news — you're approved and ready for templating! Let's get you scheduled. When works best for you this week or next? 📅

outreach.subject: Let's Schedule Your Templating Appointment!
outreach.message:
Hi Tracy,

Exciting news — everything is set and you're ready for templating! This is the step where we come out and take precise measurements to ensure a perfect fit.

It takes about 1-2 hours and is completely free. Once we have your template, we can finalize production and get your countertops installed quickly.

What days/times work best for you? We have availability this week and next.

New England Stone
Hi Jennifer! We received your measurements — working on your quote now. You'll hear from us shortly with pricing. Excited to show you what we can do! 🪨

outreach.subject: Your Quote is Being Prepared – New England Stone
outreach.message:
Hi Jennifer,

Great news — we have your measurements and we're preparing your custom countertop quote now.

We'll send it over shortly. If you have any questions or want to discuss material options in the meantime, feel free to reply or call us.

Talk soon,
New England Stone

Hi Raghuram, just following up on the quote we sent over! Any questions? We're happy to walk you through it or adjust anything. What are your thoughts? 😊

outreach.subject: Quick follow-up on your countertop quote
outreach.message:
Hi Raghuram,

I wanted to follow up on the quote we sent over. Did you get a chance to look it over?

If you have any questions about pricing, materials, or the process — I'm happy to walk you through everything. We can also adjust the quote if your needs have changed.

Looking forward to hearing from you!

Hey Kathy! This is New England Stone 👋 We saw you were interested in granite/quartz countertops. We'd love to help — do you have a quick minute to chat about what you're looking for? Reply STOP to opt out.

outreach.subject: Your Countertop Quote – New England Stone
outreach.message:
Hi Kathy,

Thanks for reaching out about new countertops! We specialize in granite and quartz installations in the MA area and would love to get you a free quote.

Could you share:
- What material are you considering? (granite, quartz, marble)
- Which room(s)? (kitchen, bathroom, both)
- Rough timeline for the project?

We'll get back to you with pricing fast.

Best,
New England Stone
